title: lvcn.json
description: Configuration for a lovdaCN project. Created and maintained by the lovdacn CLI (init/add).

$schema.description: The URL of the JSON schema for this file.

style.description: The visual style pack. Set at init and cannot be changed afterward without re-adding components.

styleEngine.description: The styling runtime. Determines how theme tokens are defined and part of the registry fetch path. Defaults to nativewind.

tsx.description: Whether components use TypeScript (.tsx/.ts) or JavaScript (.jsx/.js).

tailwind.description: How Tailwind / NativeWind is wired up.

config.description: Path to tailwind.config.js. NativeWind only; Uniwind projects define theme in CSS via @theme.

css.description: Path to the global CSS file that imports Tailwind and defines the CSS variables.

baseColor.description: The neutral base palette used to generate theme tokens.

aliases.description: Import aliases the CLI uses when writing component source.

components.description: Component names already added to the project. The CLI appends to this automatically on add.

baseColor.description: Neutral palette (mirrors tailwind.baseColor). Part of the resolved theme preset.

theme.description: Accent / primary color (e.g. blue, rose, emerald, neutral).

chartColor.description: Base color for --chart-1..5 (e.g. sky, pink, blue).

font.description: Font family via @expo-google-fonts (e.g. inter, dm-sans, space-grotesk, geist).
